texto: How often do you ignore a dream, dismiss it as fantasy and then see echoes of the dream around you the following day? What if a dream were the forewarning of what will become your reality; if you are being told within the world of a dream what may occur in the near or distant future, but your mind mangles the truth and information so much that you discard it as fiction?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Samantha Robertson que provoca esforço, persistência e resultados. Ao questionar “How often do you ignore a dream, dismiss it as fantasy and then see echoes of the dream around yo…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, dream, fiction, com foco em fiction e forewarning.
